meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template for Your Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle. Use this beginner-friendly Antigravity project template and Claude Code guide to build, deploy, and land your first job.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends by building high-utility, AI-integrated tools that solve real problems. By leveraging Antigravity’s templating engine and Claude Code’s autonomous workflow, you can move from blank screen to production-ready application in hours, demonstrating technical proficiency and architectural thinking to future employers immediately.
content.intro:
You stare at the screen, a cursor blinking in the void of a blank IDE, feeling the crushing weight of the 'no experience' paradox. Every job posting demands a portfolio, yet you lack the projects to build one. It is a cycle of frustration that stalls thousands of brilliant developers before they even begin their careers.

But the rules of the game have shifted. The era of manual boilerplate is over. By utilizing the Antigravity project template and the raw speed of Claude Code, you aren't just writing code; you are orchestrating an AI-driven development pipeline that turns months of manual labor into a weekend of architectural mastery.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Environment
steps.description: Establish your baseline project structure to ensure modularity and scalability from the very first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a clean, production-ready SaaS boilerplate using the Antigravity default template with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Core Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your unique project idea into a structured schema that Antigravity can interpret and scaffold.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a project management tool including users, tasks, and project categories. Use strict typing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate database schema based on requirements.md'

steps.title: Automate UI Component Generation
steps.description: Use AI to bridge the gap between backend schema and a polished, professional frontend interface.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard component using Shadcn UI that displays project tasks in a Kanban board layout.

steps.title: Implement AI-Powered Features
steps.description: Integrate intelligent features that make your project stand out to recruiters, such as automated summaries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate an AI service to automatically generate a summary of project tasks whenever a status changes to completed.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'implement taskSummaryService.ts using OpenAI API'

steps.title: Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Finalize your project with production-ready configurations and a README that sells your skills.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README.md that highlights the technical architecture, key challenges solved, and how to run the project locally.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate comprehensive documentation for the project'

pro_tips: Always commit your code after every successful Claude Code block to maintain a granular, impressive GitHub contribution history.
Use Antigravity's 'dry-run' mode to inspect generated code before applying it to your main codebase to learn the underlying architecture.
Focus on 'depth over breadth'; it is better to have one perfectly documented, complex app than five half-finished tutorials.
Add a 'Challenges Overcome' section in your README to show recruiters your problem-solving process, not just your syntax skills.
Use Claude Code's explain command on complex generated functions to ensure you can defend your code during technical interviews.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, share your live link on LinkedIn with a breakdown of the technical decisions you made. Then, start your second project by modifying the Antigravity template to solve a different industry problem.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect moment to start your career. Build the project that gets you hired, master the tools that industry leaders use, and stop letting the 'no portfolio' label define your potential. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
